description: Humanlinker is an AI sales tool for hyper-personalized prospecting, with 360-degree prospect analysis, personality insights, and automated LinkedIn and email outreach.
overview: Humanlinker personalizes outreach with AI, offering lead recommendations, 360-degree prospect analysis and personality insights, and automated LinkedIn and email messaging.
what_is: Humanlinker is an AI sales tool built for personalized outreach at scale. It generates messages tailored to each contact and adds prospect analysis and personality insights, which helps reps engage more relevantly and lift reply rates.

It is strongest for B2B teams scaling personalized email and LinkedIn campaigns, where SDRs, marketers, and managers want high-volume but targeted prospecting. Teams often see better response rates and booked meetings within days.

Humanlinker integrates with CRMs, enriches leads with email and phone data, and manages a unified inbox. It is built for B2B sales outreach rather than replacing core CRM functions or manual relationship building.
